title: 2PCS Anti Chew Spray for Dogs, Bitter Apple Dog Spray, 240ml Natural Dog Repellent Spray to Stop Chewing, Cat Deterrent Spray Training Behavior Aids for Dogs
features: Effective Bitter Apple Spray For Dogs: Train your pet easily with our no chew spray! Use it patiently to correct your dog's bad chewing behavior, your dog will gradually stay away from the sprayed objects or areas. This helps keep your home clean and your dog healthy

Safe & Non-Toxic Formula: Formulated with bitter apple, orange peel, peppermint, our pet-safe spray discourages chewing and scratching without harm. Ideal for protecting furniture, wounds, and more. Free from harsh chemicals, it’s safe for daily use and multi-pet homes

Protect Your Home & Furniture: Keep your home damage-free! This anti-chew spray protects furniture, curtains, plants, and more, leaving no stains or residue, no pungent odor, keeping your home tidy while effectively deterring pet destructive behavior

Easy to Use: Shake thoroughly before each use, then spray on the area you want to prevent chewing. It is recommended to spray this anti-chew dog spray 3 to 4 times a day in the first month. Observe your pet's reaction and adjust the frequency accordingly until there is no more chewing
Suitable for Multiple Pets: Perfect for dogs, cats, rabbits, and other small pets! Whether training a new pet or correcting bad habits, this safe and effective spray promotes better behavior.
